requirement_topic.en: Battery-specific governance — ANOR, NC standard alignment, and import conformity where in scope
requirement_topic.zh: 电池专项监管——ANOR、NC标准采纳及范围内入境合格
requirement_topic.zht: 電池專項監管——ANOR、NC標準採納及範圍內入境合格

summary.en: Cameroon uses ANOR to steward market-oriented technical standards. Lithium battery imports are handled through adopted Normes Camerounaises (NC) frameworks and, for regulated products, are expected to follow a pre-shipment/import conformity path similar to a PECAE inspection process before customs handling. The current practical regime is governance-led rather than a single battery-law statute: safety is assessed through imported product conformity and inspection gates, not through an EU-style battery-regulation passport system.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆通过ANOR推动市场技术标准管理。锂电池进口在相关受监管产品范围内按采用的喀麦隆国家标准（NC）框架执行，并在多个环节要求类似PECAE的入境前合规和检验流程。当前实践更偏向治理程序化管理而非单一电池法：其安全管理通过进口合规与检验节点实现，而非欧盟式电池护照体系。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆透過ANOR推動市場技術標準管理。鋰電池進口在相關受監管產品範圍內依據採納之喀麥隆國家標準（NC）體系執行，並在多環節要求類似PECAE的入境前合規及檢驗流程。現行實務更偏向治理程式化管理，而非單一電池法：其安全管理透過進口合規與檢驗關口實現，而非歐盟式電池護照體系。

standards_or_laws: ANOR and the Normes Camerounaises (NC) implementation framework for regulated imported electrical products
PECAE-style pre-import conformity and documentary control mechanism as announced in Cameroon import channels
National customs and port control procedures for regulated goods at Douala and Kribi

summary.en: China has no equivalent nationwide battery- Passport regime. Compliance is managed through GB/GB-T safety rules and CCC where applicable for domestic circulation, plus customs paperwork under Chinese export administration. CN rules do not by themselves satisfy Cameroon-specific import conformity or inspection steps. CCC is not a substitution for ANOR/NC conformity inspection in Cameroon.
summary.zh: 中国没有对应的全国性电池法护照制度。其合规以GB/GB-T安全规则和适用类目的CCC为主，并结合中国出口报关要求。CN规则本身不足以满足喀麦隆特有的入境合规与检验步骤。CCC不能替代喀麦隆的ANOR/NC合规检验路径。
summary.zht: 中國沒有對應的全國性電池護照制度。其合規主要依GB/GB-T安全規則及適用品類CCC，加上中國出口報關程序。中國規則本身不足以滿足喀麥隆特有的入境合規與檢驗步驟。CCC不能替代喀麥隆的ANOR/NC合規檢驗途徑。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 and related GB/T lithium battery safety documents
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) where applicable for domestic/Chinese market classes
CNCA and GACC export administration procedures

gap.en: The gap is structural. Cameroon requires conformity and inspection steps driven by ANOR/NC and import-control channels, including importer-driven documentation, while China side certificates are domestic evidence only. There is no direct legal mapping to an EU-style battery passport, recycled-content reporting, or carbon-footprint requirement in this lane. For market entry, exporters must complete Cameroon import-compliance routing and maintain French-language packageable evidence for the declared in-country importer.
gap.zh: 差距是制度结构性差异。喀麦隆要求基于ANOR/NC和入境监管渠道的合规及检验流程，并以进口商驱动文件链条为核心，而中国证书多数为国内证据。该线路没有与欧盟式电池护照、再生材料含量申报或碳足迹义务的一一对应。进入市场的关键是完成喀麦隆入境合规路径，并为在境内进口商准备法语文件。
gap.zht: 差距是制度結構性差異。喀麥隆要求基於ANOR/NC及入境監管管道的合規與檢驗流程，並以進口商驅動的文件鏈條為核心，而中國證書多屬國內證據。該線路沒有與歐盟式電池護照、再生材料含量申報或碳足跡義務的一一對應。進入市場關鍵是完成喀麥隆入境合規路徑，並為境內進口商準備法語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Regulated import routes are mandatory in-scope and require ANOR/NC-aligned conformity and import inspection routing before customs release
mandatory_status.cn: Domestic Chinese GB/CCC requirements are mandatory domestically for categories covered in China, but they do not create the Cameroon import-conformity and inspection pathway

source.publisher: ANOR (Agence Nationale de Normalisation et de la Qualité)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Assume ANOR/NC and Cameroon import-control routing is the operative requirement for in-scope regulated battery imports, with no direct Chinese-to-Cameroon legal equivalence to EU battery-regulation passports. CN-side GB/GB-T and CCC evidence remains useful as technical proof but is not sufficient for Cameroon customs-release compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对受管制电池进口，应以ANOR/NC及喀麦隆入境监管流程作为实务约束，不能将中国GB/GB-T与CCC视为对等于喀麦隆入境规则。喀麦隆市场没有可直接映射的欧盟式电池护照义务，CN侧证据只能作为技术参考，不能单独满足通关合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對受管制電池進口，應以ANOR/NC及喀麥隆入境監管流程作為實務約束，不能將中國GB/GB-T與CCC視為對等喀麥隆入境規則。喀麥隆市場沒有可直接對應的歐盟式電池護照義務，中國側證據只能作為技術參考，不能單獨滿足通關合規。
